components.name: accordion
components.description: A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections.

components.name: alert
components.description: Displays a callout for important messages.

components.name: alert-dialog
components.description: A modal dialog that interrupts with important content and expects a response.

components.name: avatar
components.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

components.name: badge
components.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

components.name: button
components.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

components.name: card
components.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

components.name: collapsible
components.description: An interactive component that expands and collapses content.

components.name: dialog
components.description: A modal dialog that renders on top of the page.

components.name: input
components.description: Displays a form input field.

components.name: input-otp
components.description: Accessible one-time password input with copy paste support.

components.name: label
components.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

components.name: progress
components.description: Displays an indicator showing the progress of a task.

components.name: radio-group
components.description: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked at a time.

components.name: select
components.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

components.name: separator
components.description: Visually separates content.

components.name: sheet
components.description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen.

components.name: skeleton
components.description: Used to show a placeholder while content is loading.

components.name: slider
components.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

components.name: switch
components.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between two states.

components.name: table
components.description: A responsive table component.

components.name: tabs
components.description: A set of layered sections of content displayed one at a time.

components.name: textarea
components.description: Displays a form textarea field.

components.name: toast
components.description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily.

components.name: toggle
components.description: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

components.name: toggle-group
components.description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled.

components.name: tooltip
components.description: A popup that displays information related to an element on hover.
